tokens.@BORDER_TYPE: Border handling policy resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@INTERPOLATION: Interpolation policy resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@OUT_COLS: Output image width resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@OUT_ROWS: Output image height resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@bottom: Composition token resolved by the functional composition layer.
tokens.@input: Input image from the previous pipeline step.
tokens.@left: Composition token resolved by the functional composition layer.
tokens.@right: Composition token resolved by the functional composition layer.
tokens.@top: Composition token resolved by the functional composition layer.
